item.title: Rotator Recovery for a Playhouse Move
item.description: A heavy rotator is used for a careful recovery and move involving a playhouse. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and controlled handling needed for the job. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Rotator Recovery for a Playhouse Move
media:content.media:description: A heavy rotator is used for a careful recovery and move involving a playhouse. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and controlled handling needed for the job. What would you like to see next?

item.title: Pulling a Luxury SUV Out of a Ditch
item.description: A recovery scenario involving a luxury SUV stuck in a ditch, requiring precise towing techniques to avoid damage while restoring mobility. The focus is on careful handling and controlled extraction. What factor do you think matters most in this type of recovery?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Luxury SUV Out of a Ditch
media:content.media:description: A recovery scenario involving a luxury SUV stuck in a ditch, requiring precise towing techniques to avoid damage while restoring mobility. The focus is on careful handling and controlled extraction. What factor do you think matters most in this type of recovery?

item.title: School Bus Tow and Recovery
item.description: A structured recovery operation involving a school bus, focusing on careful towing procedures, safety awareness, and vehicle stabilization during extraction. What do you think is the most challenging part of this recovery?

media:content.media:title: School Bus Tow and Recovery
media:content.media:description: A structured recovery operation involving a school bus, focusing on careful towing procedures, safety awareness, and vehicle stabilization during extraction. What do you think is the most challenging part of this recovery?

item.title: Bobcat Recovery After a Quick Escape
item.description: A recovery involving compact construction equipment from Bobcat Company after an unexpected situation in the field. The focus is on controlled retrieval, safety procedures, and equipment handling in tight environments. What recovery step stands out most here?

media:content.media:title: Bobcat Recovery After a Quick Escape
media:content.media:description: A recovery involving compact construction equipment from Bobcat Company after an unexpected situation in the field. The focus is on controlled retrieval, safety procedures, and equipment handling in tight environments. What recovery step stands out most here?

item.title: Intense TATOR vs. MAJOR Haul
item.description: A heavy recovery haul featuring TATOR and MAJOR in a real-world towing and rescue operation. The focus is on the equipment, the recovery process, and the work involved in moving heavy vehicles

item.title: Dump Truck Recovery After Spin-Down and Engine Lock
item.description: A dump truck spins down with an engine lock and obstacles in the way, requiring careful recovery work and the right equipment to move it safely. How would you handle a scene like this?

media:content.media:description: A dump truck spins down with an engine lock and obstacles in the way, requiring careful recovery work and the right equipment to move it safely. How would you handle a scene like this?

item.title: Pulling It Out of the Mess
item.description: A challenging recovery scenario where a stuck vehicle is carefully extracted from a difficult position using proper towing techniques and equipment. It highlights control, traction, and recovery strategy. What would you prioritize first in this situation?

media:content.media:title: Pulling It Out of the Mess
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery scenario where a stuck vehicle is carefully extracted from a difficult position using proper towing techniques and equipment. It highlights control, traction, and recovery strategy. What would you prioritize first in this situation?

item.title: Towing a Truck After Service Hours Run Out
item.description: A roadside recovery operation involving a truck that requires towing after mechanical issues occur outside regular service hours. The focus is on safe handling, timing, and coordinated recovery work. What part of roadside recovery do you find most critical?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Truck After Service Hours Run Out
media:content.media:description: A roadside recovery operation involving a truck that requires towing after mechanical issues occur outside regular service hours. The focus is on safe handling, timing, and coordinated recovery work. What part of roadside recovery do you find most critical?

item.title: Sand-Filled Semi Recovery
item.description: A sand-filled semi creates a challenging recovery scenario as weight, shifting material, and terrain make the operation slow and precise.

media:content.media:description: A sand-filled semi creates a challenging recovery scenario as weight, shifting material, and terrain make the operation slow and precise.
